deep_dive.title: SemEval-2026 Task 9: Detecting Multilingual, Multicultural and Multievent Online Polarization
deep_dive.abstract: We present SemEval-2026 Task 9, a shared task on online polarization detection, covering 22 languages and comprising over 110K annotated instances. Each data instance is multi-labeled with the presence of polarization, polarization type, and polarization manifestation. Participants were asked to predict labels in three sub-tasks: (1) detecting the presence of polarization, (2) identifying the type of polarization, and (3) recognizing the polarization manifestation. The three tasks attracted over 1,000 participants worldwide and more than 10k submission on Codabench. We received final submissions from 67 teams and 73 system description papers. We report the baseline results and analyze the performance of the best-performing systems, highlighting the most common approaches and the most effective methods across different subtasks and languages. The dataset of this task is publicly available.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_en: Detecting online polarization and its manifestations is a form of sentiment and opinion analysis.
deep_dive.llm_evidence_cn: 检测在线极化及其表现形式是情感和观点分析的一种形式。

deep_dive.llm_tldr_en: A shared task for detecting multilingual online polarization, identifying its types and manifestations.
deep_dive.llm_tldr_cn: 一个用于检测多语言在线极化、识别其类型和表现形式的共享任务。
deep_dive.llm_tldr: 一个用于检测多语言在线极化、识别其类型和表现形式的共享任务。
deep_dive.matched_query_text: Papers central to 情感分析, especially work that connects or combines: 文本中的情感特征和倾向分析; 如何从文本中准确识别和分类情感.
